# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-06-07)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Responsiveness and minimal clinically important changes of surface topography parameters in adolescents with idiopathic scoliosis: results from the schroth exercise trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik responsiveness and minimal clinically important changes of surface topography parameters in adolescents with idiopathic skolyoz: results from the schroth egzersiz klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: european spine journal : official publication of the european spine society, the european spinal deformity society, and the european section of the cervical spine research society. 2026 jun 6. Anahtar kavramlar: european, spine, society, responsiveness, minimal, clinically.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42249909/

- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik reliability and agreement of a novel trunk extension strength assessment device and association to dynamic performance. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of back and musculoskeletal rehabilitasyon. 2026 jun 6. Anahtar kavramlar: reliability, agreement, novel, trunk, extension, strength.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42249786/

### Short-term effects of diaphragmatic myofascial release on pain, mobility, and disability in chronic nonspecific low back pain: a randomized sham-controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik short-term effects of diaphragmatic myofascial release on ağrı, mobility, and disability in chronic nonspecific bel ağrısı: a randomize sham-controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: scientific reports. 2026 jun 5. Anahtar kavramlar: ağrı, short, term, effects, diaphragmatic, myofascial.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42248964/

### Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value fizyoterapi for chronic ağrı: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: disability and rehabilitasyon. 2026 jun 5. Anahtar kavramlar: physiotherapist, related, barriers, enablers, implementation, high.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42248214/

### Preconditioning Mesenchymal Stem Cells to Enhance Performance in the Degenerate Nucleus Pulposus.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik preconditioning mesenchymal stem cells to enhance performance in the degenerate nucleus pulposus. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: tissue engineering. part b, reviews. 2026 jun 5. Anahtar kavramlar: preconditioning, mesenchymal, stem, cells, enhance, performance.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42246491/

- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik morphological and compositional features of lomber (bel bölgesi) multifidus in athletes with chronic non-specific bel ağrısı: a sistematik derleme and meta-analiz. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: international journal of sports fizik tedavi / fizyoterapi. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: morphological, compositional, features, lomber (bel bölgesi), multifidus, athletes.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42245760/

- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik operatively treated pelvic ring fractures in adult patient with osteogenesis imperfecta after traumatic injury: a case report. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: hawai'i journal of health & social welfare. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: operatively, treated, pelvic, ring, fractures, adult.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42245243/
